name: Planable
description:
What Planable Does

Planable is specially designed for teams collaborating on social media campaigns. It is a hub for ideation, content development, and feedback management.

Although it is more geared toward social teams, Planable can schedule Google Business Profile posts.  Planable allows businesses to continuously schedule fresh content on their Google Business Profiles.

Source: Planable

Key Features

  • With Planable, you can plan, schedule, and publish content for your Google Business Profile. You can schedule different types of Google posts, including “What's New,” Events, Offers, etc.
  • It features bulk scheduling and publishing.
  • Planable features enhanced content productivity through AI support:
  1. Feed View: Views as they would appear on feeds.
  2. Calendar view: An overview of posts as scheduled.
  3. List view: A quick view of posts across all pages.  
  • Streamlined collaboration and customized workflow - with approval routes.

Benefits of Planable

The main benefits of Planable include:

  • Scheduling (including bulk scheduling) and publishing content on your Google Business Profile.
  • The three-tier content view approach allows teams to visualize their work.
  • Flexible workflows and approval hierarchy.
  • Performance evaluations with analytics.
  • Access via the web and mobile options provides 24/7 access to the platform.  

Pricing

Planable has four plans available, starting with a free option:

  • Free  
  • Basic: USD 39 /month  
  • Pro: USD 59 /month  
  • Enterprise: Customized pricing  

Pros

✅ Post scheduling on GBP

✅ Content generation & post reviews

✅ User-friendly platform

Cons

🚫Does not have listings management

🚫Does not offer full GBP management (only limited features)

It is a good question, right?

Fortunately, you now know what to look for when choosing a Google Business Profile Post Scheduler. With extensive information about the leading post-scheduler software tools, including their features, pros, cons, and pricing, you can now make an informed decision.

While reading, could you focus on a shortlist of tools that may satisfy your business needs? You can bookmark and revisit this post until you have finalized your decision.

You can now look forward to fully leveraging the Google Business Profile features, seeing your business dominating local searches, and attracting more customers than ever. With this informed strategy, your business turnover will trend upwards sooner than expected.

Make your choice while it is fresh in your mind.

Why Synup?

  2. We form partnerships where our users share their pain points, and our team of experts helps resolve them permanently.  
  3. Our managed services put you ahead of the game. Leverage our years of experience and use the resources that help us drive results.
  4. Synup offers industry-leading, innovative solutions to save time and increase business turnover. Our automated tools do the tedious work, letting you focus on managing your business.
  5. White-label solutions allow agencies to own their marketing campaigns with all-around branding.

Want to learn more? Speak with our team or book a demo with a Synup product specialist today.

‍

Top 12 Google My Business Post Schedulers: FAQs

1. What is Google My Business called now?

In 2021, Google My Business rebranded to Google Business Profile. This transition changed how businesses manage their profiles and interact with Google's services.

Google Business Profile streamlined business information management directly from Google Search or Maps, making it easier for small business owners. The change integrated business profile management with Google’s core services.

2. Is it worth to have a Google Business Profile?

A Google Business Profile is important to guarantee your local business listing can be found easily on Google and Google Maps. It is critical since most people search for businesses online.

3. Which steps can I take to rank high on Google Business Profile?

Six tips for optimizing Google Business Profile account sections to rank higher on Google Maps include:

  • Be consistent with your business name and address.
  • Use a local phone number.
  • Include your tracked and main number.
  • Keep your hours updated.
  • Have a concise business description.
  • Categorize your business properly.

4. When are the best times to post on Google Business Profile?

The best times to post on Google Business Profile for maximum online user engagement are:

  • Start of the workday: Posting during the early business hours: 9-10 AM.
  • Noon-time: Posting updates or offers during lunchtime:  12-2 PM.
  • End of the workday: People browse the internet at the end of the day. 4–6 PM
